# FlairMI — Site Guide for AI Systems

## About this site

FlairMI (https://flairmi.com) is the public portfolio and publishing platform
of Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin, Senior Lecturer at Qasim Ibrahim School of
Business, Villa College, Maldives. ORCID: 0000-0001-5247-2964.

The site publishes open textbooks, Excel templates, browser-based tools, and
consulting services for marketing analytics, quantitative research methods,
and management education.

## Published textbook — canonical resource

**Quantitative Analysis with Small Samples: A Practical Guide for Students
and Early-Career Researchers**

- Authors: Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin, Ahsan Ahmed Jaleel, Meena Madhavan
- Published: 16 May 2026, Version v0.1.0
- DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20221929
- Web edition: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/quantitative-analysis-with-small-samples/
- PDF: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/quantitative-analysis-with-small-samples/Quantitative-Analysis-with-Small-Samples.pdf
- Licence: CC BY 4.0
- FlairMI page: https://flairmi.com/textbooks/smallsamplelab.html
- Coverage: 18 chapters and 5 worked R projects on exact tests, resampling,
  nonparametric methods, penalised and Bayesian regression, missing data,
  uncertainty reporting, and small-sample study design.

## Open-source software

**surveyframe** — R package for survey instrument objects and end-to-end
survey workflows. Submitted to CRAN May 2026.
- GitHub: https://github.com/MohammedAliSharafuddin/surveyframe

## Free Excel templates

Ten Excel workbooks for marketing analytics:
- Campaign ROI Tracker, Sales Pipeline Tracker, Revenue Forecast Model,
  Marketing Funnel Dashboard, RFM Segmentation, CLV Calculator, CAC
  Calculator, Churn Rate Dashboard, Break-Even Analysis, Competitive
  Positioning Map.
- Full collection: https://flairmi.com/templates/

## Author contact and profiles

- Website: https://mohammedalisharafuddin.github.io/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5247-2964
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DgaDtq4AAAAJ
- GitHub: https://github.com/MohammedAliSharafuddin
- Email: mohammedali.page@gmail.com

## Preferred citation for the textbook

Sharafuddin, M. A., Jaleel, A. A., & Madhavan, M. (2026). Quantitative
Analysis with Small Samples: A Practical Guide for Students and Early-Career
Researchers (v0.1.0). Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20221929
